subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to follow up after the conference! I'd be glad to get a formal meeting on the calendar to explore how we might work together.

Here are some slots available on our end:

- Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Let me know which works best for you and I'll send a calendar invite right away.

On the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I'm not in a position to share internal contact information. If you'd like to connect with specific members of our team, please refer to our public website for the appropriate contact channels.

Looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards
